channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: CES 2025: Vay Expands Las Vegas EV Fleet to 100 Cars - A Disruptor in Rideshare Experience
item.description: Vay, a remotely driven vehicle service, is expanding its fleet of electric cars in Las Vegas to over 100 vehicles. The company has been operational since 2024 and has taken more than 6,000 rides. Vay's unique model offers users control while using the service, which can be cheaper than traditional ride-sharing services.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
